# Reyna Pay

Reyna Pay LLC is a vertical-first payment processing infrastructure company. We power industry-specific payment products including SalonTransact (for salons, salontransact.com) and KasseApp (for restaurants/POS, kasseapp.com), plus a partner network of branded payment products across many industries.

## Mission

To build vertical-specific payment processors for industries the giants ignore — with transparent pricing, real support, and infrastructure that fits how each industry actually operates.

## Products

- **SalonTransact** (https://salontransact.com): Salon-first payment processing — card-on-file, stylist commission attribution, no-show automation, booking integration.
- **KasseApp** (https://kasseapp.com): POS and payments for restaurants, bars, and food service — table management, tip pools, kitchen ticketing, integrated payments.
- **Reyna Pay Platform** (https://reynapay.com): The infrastructure powering it all. PCI-compliant, card-network certified, bank-sponsored.
- **Reyna Pay Partner Program** (https://reynapay.com/partners): For entrepreneurs launching their own branded payment business in their vertical.

## Industries we serve

Salons, barbershops, med spas, tattoo studios, nail salons, lash & brow studios, restaurants, bars, coffee shops, food trucks, gyms, yoga & pilates studios, auto repair shops, pet grooming, retail, e-commerce, professional services. See https://reynapay.com/who-we-serve for the full list.

## Solutions / capabilities

Card-on-file payments, no-show fee automation, stylist commission tracking, tip pool management, multi-location reporting, white-label payment processing, interchange-plus pricing, chargeback evidence packs, same-day payouts, recurring billing, booking integration, POS integration. See https://reynapay.com/solutions.

## Founder

Robert Reyna, CEO of Salon Envy® (multi-location salon franchise) and serial operator across real estate, contracting, and software.
